name: madr-enforcement
description: Enforces architectural standards and guidelines defined in MADRs (Markdown Any Decision Records) when writing, reviewing, or modifying code in CellixJS. Use this skill when: (1) writing new code to ensure it follows documented architectural decisions, (2) reviewing code to verify compliance with ADR standards, (3) refactoring to align with established patterns, (4) making architectural decisions that may require creating new ADRs.
